root.sql:
select sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date ,sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_account_name
,( select sum( deposit_balance ) from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno tnest where tnest.monthly_date = PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_RelativeMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date , -1 ) and tnest.deposit_account_no = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_account_no ) as bal_bf
, coalesce( ( select sum( deposit_by_cash_balance ) from sc_dep_t_deposit_slip ,sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no and cancel_status = '0' and deposit_slip_type in ('OCA','DEP') and operate_date between PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_FirstDayOfMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date::date ) and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_account_no ) , 0 ) as bal_dep
, coalesce( ( select sum( deposit_by_cash_balance ) from sc_dep_t_deposit_slip ,sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no and cancel_status = '0' and deposit_slip_type not in ('OCA','DEP') and operate_date between PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_FirstDayOfMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date::date ) and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_account_no ) , 0 ) as bal_withdraw
,sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_balance as bal_fw
, ( select interest_rate from sc_dep_m_int_step_rate where deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and interest_rate > 0 and effective_date = ( select max(effective_date ) from sc_dep_m_int_step_rate where deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and interest_rate > 0 ) ) as int_rate
from sc_cls_mon_dep ,sc_cls_mon_dep_accno ,sc_dep_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.monthly_date and sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_type_code and sc_dep_m_rule.cat_id = '1' -- สอ อื่น /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date = '31/7/2019' and sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_balance > 0
order by sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_account_no
